Join a dynamic project supporting a leading European AI company in building and maintaining advanced large language model (LLM) inference platforms for enterprise and government clients. This role focuses on ensuring the reliability, scalability, and performance of LLM inference services, with a strong emphasis on Kubernetes-based orchestration and modern cloud infrastructure. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate, operate, and optimize LLM inference APIs, playing a key part in the delivery of robust AI solutions at scale.
